title: Increasing limits to My Work
excerpt: Would love to have an increase to the amount of items to be kept in My Work. I have just over 1400 and I was just informed I can’t as an individual go over 1000 items. This is causing some items to not show as overdue in…

posts.author: kbraaten19 (Krista )
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to have an increase to the amount of items to be kept in My Work. I have just over 1400 and I was just informed I can’t as an individual go over 1000 items. This is causing some items to not show as overdue in my My Work. This is frustrating as a small business. Might need to use another platform or system in order to get all tasks assigned and taken care of in a timely manner.
